title: They Made $0 for 4 Years. Then Built a $22B Startup | The Kalshi Story
summary: Kalshi, founded by Tarek Mansour and Luana Lopes Lara, built a regulated financial exchange for prediction markets despite four years of regulatory opposition and ultimately sued a government agency to gain approval. The startup scaled from zero to billions in volume and achieved a $22 billion valuation.
